_comment: TOGGLE FILE for the hard-enforcement Stop hook. Turn enforcement ON by copying this file to .claude/output-style.enforce.json; turn it OFF by deleting that copy. Edit the checks below to match your output style. The hook can only verify structurally CHECKABLE rules (regex markers, length) — keep the full human-readable format in .claude/output-styles/rasa-default.md. See content/output-style-enforcement/README.md.
message: Your last response must follow .claude/output-styles/rasa-default.md: any response longer than a few sentences needs at least one Markdown heading or bold section label so its structure is scannable. Add structure and resend.
